title: States Told to Tighten Cyber Defences as AI Threats Grow
description: Shafaqna India: Flagging the growing use of artificial intelligence by cybercriminals to launch faster and more sophisticated attacks, the Centre has directed all ministries, states, union territories and key financial regulators to urgently strengthen their cybersecurity framework and review vulnerabilities in their digital infrastructure. The Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) warned that advances in [...]

title: Orbital AI Data Centers: Son Cites Latency and Launch Cost as SpaceX Race Heats Up
description: Orbital AI data centers face a credibility gap after SoftBank founder Masayoshi Son told shareholders the chip costs, launch prices, and inter-satellite latency make SpaceX's orbital compute vision irrelevant to the AI race's decisive years — and every prominent critic shares his enormous terrestrial stake.

title: I don't hide my use of AI. I want my kids to see how I use it to make life easier
description: The author used Claude to plan a multigenerational trip with her family and dad. Courtesy of the author I use AI regularly for work, parenting, and everyday problem-solving.
